read: high regret among movers = price paths sacrifice short-run best response (consistent with reactive-threat conduct); low regret = near-best-response competitive algorithms. Static (non-moving) cells have zero regret by construction and are silent — the ABS rigidity story lives outside this test
claim_boundary: v1: inverse-square share model (documented default, not audited weights), single-GPU cost proxy, best-in-own-menu comparator (not global). Caveat: threat-free algorithmic collusion evades regret screens entirely.
